Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's the men's restroom. Should I go in...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1102 0 0}Wait, really? At a time like this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 51 -1 0 0}Just try to be quick, will you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 51 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1090 0 0}Seriously? Again!? You're not doing this on purpose, are you?[n]{f 1 1}
